tasks.name: Environment Setup and Verification
tasks.description: Install required packages (sae-lens, transformer-lens, scipy, scikit-learn, matplotlib, seaborn). Verify GPU availability. Cache GPT-2 model and SAE weights.
tasks.expected_output: Environment ready, GPU verified, model weights cached

pilot.pass_criteria: sae-lens and transformer-lens import successfully; GPU visible; GPT-2 and SAE weights accessible

tasks.name: Pilot: Activation Patching Validation
tasks.description: Validate 9 persistent core words using activation patching. Zero child feature -> measure parent recovery. Tests whether persistent words are genuine absorption or metric artifact.

pilot.pass_criteria: Parent recovery > 10% for at least 3/9 core words; no crashes

tasks.name: Full: Activation Patching on 9 Core Words
tasks.description: Complete activation patching validation on 9 persistent core words. For each word: zero child feature, measure parent recovery. Use 1000 samples for robust statistics.

visualizations.description: Parent recovery % for 9 core words (full validation)

tasks.name: Pilot: Steering Effectiveness by CV
tasks.description: Test whether CV predicts steering effectiveness. Compare steering on 10 high-CV vs 10 low-CV features. Tests H4/actionability connection.

pilot.pass_criteria: High-CV shows larger steering effect than low-CV; no crashes

visualizations.description: Steering effect: high-CV vs low-CV groups

tasks.name: Full: Steering Effectiveness Test (30 vs 30)
tasks.description: Complete steering test on 30 high-CV absorbed vs 30 low-CV non-absorbed features. Test at steering strengths ±3, ±5, ±7. Measure logit change at semantically appropriate tokens.

visualizations.description: Steering effect vs strength for high-CV and low-CV groups

tasks.name: Full: Cross-Layer at λ_c=5e-5 (Revised)
tasks.description: Measure absorption at layers [0,3,6,9,11] using λ_c=5e-5 (not λ=0.001) to test whether layer heterogeneity appears at true critical point.

visualizations.description: Absorption rate by layer at λ_c=5e-5

tasks.name: Analysis: Updated Hypothesis Tests
tasks.description: Compute statistical tests for all hypotheses including new activation patching and steering results. Generate summary table with pass/fail per hypothesis.

tasks.name: Analysis: Generate Publication Figures
tasks.description: Generate all publication-ready figures (PDF and PNG) from experiment results.

pilot_overview: Three pilot experiments validate activation patching (CRITICAL gap), steering effectiveness by CV, and cross-layer at true critical sparsity.

pilot_decision_criteria.advance_to_full: Pilot shows measurable recovery (>10%) and steering effect difference in expected direction
pilot_decision_criteria.refine: Pilot shows weak signal; adjust feature selection or increase sample count
pilot_decision_criteria.pivot: Pilot shows zero recovery and no steering difference; reconsider contribution narrative

iteration_2_lessons_applied: Activation Patching UNEXECUTED for 3 consecutive reviews - this is the ONLY experiment that distinguishes metric artifact from genuine absorption
H10 (Homeostatic Rebalancing) is a phantom contribution - never executed but appears as key contribution
LCA Framework logical incoherence - H6 falsified but paper claims support from H7 asymmetry
All 4 supported hypotheses (H1,H2,H4,H5) have strong empirical backing - focus on validation now
